description: As a librarian I want to see the catalog so that I can locate books.

elements.name: Listing all books returns titles, authors, ISBN, totals and availability sorted by title

steps.name: the library has the following books:
the catalog is sorted by title case-insensitively

elements.name: A book detail includes its reservation queue depth

the response error message is "Book not found"

name: US-1 — View the catalog

description:
As a librarian I want to add new books and register new members so that
  the catalog and member roll stay current.

elements.name: Adding a new book succeeds

steps.name: the librarian adds a book "Solaris" by "Stanislaw Lem" with ISBN "978-0-156-02760-7" and 2 copies
the book "Solaris" is in the catalog

elements.name: Adding a book with a duplicate ISBN is rejected

steps.name: the library has the following books:
the librarian adds a book "Different Title" by "Other" with ISBN "9783161484100" and 1 copies
the librarian adds a book "Another Title" by "Other" with ISBN "9783161484100" and 1 copies
the response error message is "ISBN already exists"

elements.name: Adding a member with a valid email succeeds

steps.name: the librarian adds a member "Casey Lin" with email "casey@example.org"

elements.name: Adding a member with a duplicate email is rejected

steps.name: the librarian adds a member "First Person" with email "shared@example.org"
the librarian adds a member "Second Person" with email "shared@example.org"
the response error message is "Email already exists"

name: US-2 — Add books and members

description:
As a librarian I want to record a lend so that the borrower has a tracked loan
  and the catalog shows the right availability.

elements.name: A successful checkout creates an active loan with a 14-day due date

steps.name: the library has the following members:
the library has the following books:
the loan due date is 14 days from today

elements.name: A 6th simultaneous loan is rejected

the library has the following books:
the librarian tries to lend "Dune" to "Alice"
the response error message is "Loan limit reached"

elements.name: A suspended member cannot borrow

steps.name: the library has the following members:
the library has the following books:
the librarian tries to lend "Dune" to "Alice"
the response error message is "Member is suspended"

elements.name: A member with too many unpaid fines is blocked

name: US-3 — Lend a book to a member

description:
As a librarian I want to record returns so that copies become available again
  and overdue items generate fines automatically.

elements.name: Returning a loan releases the copy

name: US-4 — Record returns and fines

description:
